creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 11/24/11 12:49 PM, Maxim Ignatenko wrote:
> On ÑÑ, 24 Ð»Ð¸Ñ 2011 16:44:15 Michael Scheidell wrote:
>> could you resubmit this?  first one I tried failed.
>>
>>
>> ../daemon failed.
>>
>> Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
>> Hunk #1 succeeded at 7.
>> Hunk #2 failed at 18.
>> Hunk #3 succeeded at 66 with fuzz 1 (offset 1 line).
>> 1 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej
>> done
>> %pwd
found the problem.. this is a mega patch for four ports, and by applying 
it as written, it attempted to patch the ../Makefile (in ports/net-p2p).
I edited the patch to put in full paths, and it applied. compiling in 
tinderbox now. -qt finished, waiting for the rest.

taking a turkey break.
